query: 在规模top100基金中，业绩最好的10个

args.sql: WITH top_100_funds AS (SELECT s.fund_code, s.fund_name, s.fund_size FROM fund_size s WHERE s.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size) ORDER BY s.fund_size DESC LIMIT 100) SELECT p.fund_code AS 基金代码, p.fund_name AS 基金名称, ROUND(p.portfolio_return * 100, 2) AS 年度收益率 FROM top_100_funds t JOIN fund_performance p ON t.fund_code = p.fund_code WHERE p.period = '本年以来' ORDER BY p.portfolio_return DESC LIMIT 10

plan.rationale: 查询最新规模前100的基金中，按年度收益率排序，取前10名

generated_sql_result.基金名称: 景顺长城景颐双利债券(A类)

未指定业绩区间，使用默认的'本年以来'
